input: Summarize the following article in one sentence.
context: Anthropic released Claude 4.7 in May 2026, a new generation of large language models with improved reasoning and longer effective context windows. The model family includes Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku tiers, each tuned for different cost and latency profiles.

input: Write a brief summary of the news item below.
context: The European Union's AI Act entered into force in 2024 with phased compliance deadlines. High-risk AI systems must demonstrate transparency, human oversight, and rigorous testing. Penalties for non-compliance can reach 7% of global annual turnover.

input: Provide a one-sentence summary of this paragraph.
context: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) reduces hallucinations by injecting retrieved evidence into the prompt at inference time. RAG pipelines depend on three components: a chunker, an embedder, and a vector store. Their combined quality determines the upper bound of any downstream evaluation metric.
